summary: Good‑quality audience tape with minimal hiss and a strong first set; second set picks up after Fire when drums kick in.
review: The two fan reviews agree this is an audience source that generally sounds clear, with one noting a bit of hiss while the other praises its low noise level. Musically the show shines in the opening set (especially the early material) and although the second set feels a little thin before the drums come back after "Fire," it recovers nicely once the rhythm section is fully in.

ai_rating.rationale: Average star rating of 4 from reviewers, strong positive comments about the first set and overall tape quality offset by a single note on hiss.

recording_quality.technical_notes: One reviewer mentions noticeable hiss and possible generational loss; another says hiss is very low, calling it the best sounding audience source for this show.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as great; second set feels a bit lacking before drums re-enter after "Fire," then improves markedly.
